chapter_title.ar: باب مَوْلِدِ الْحُسَيْنِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ ( عليه السلام )
chapter_title.en: Chapter 116 – Nazool (Arrival) of Al-Husayn Bin Ali<sup>asws</sup>

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (5/362)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (5/362)
text: إِنَّ جَبْرَئِيلَ ( عليه السلام ) نَزَلَ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) فَقَالَ لَهُ يَا مُحَمَّدُ إِنَّ اللَّهَ يُبَشِّرُكَ بِمَوْلُودٍ يُولَدُ مِنْ فَاطِمَةَ تَقْتُلُهُ أُمَّتُكَ مِنْ بَعْدِكَ فَقَالَ يَا جَبْرَئِيلُ وَ عَلَى رَبِّيَ السَّلَامُ لَا حَاجَةَ لِي فِي مَوْلُودٍ يُولَدُ مِنْ فَاطِمَةَ تَقْتُلُهُ أُمَّتِي مِنْ بَعْدِي
فَعَرَجَ ثُمَّ هَبَطَ ( عليه السلام ) فَقَالَ لَهُ مِثْلَ ذَلِكَ فَقَالَ يَا جَبْرَئِيلُ وَ عَلَى رَبِّيَ السَّلَامُ لَا حَاجَةَ لِي فِي مَوْلُودٍ تَقْتُلُهُ أُمَّتِي مِنْ بَعْدِي

فَعَرَجَ جَبْرَئِيلُ ( عليه السلام ) إِلَى السَّمَاءِ ثُمَّ هَبَطَ فَقَالَ يَا مُحَمَّدُ إِنَّ رَبَّكَ يُقْرِئُكَ السَّلَامَ وَ يُبَشِّرُكَ بِأَنَّهُ جَاعِلٌ فِي ذُرِّيَّتِهِ الْإِمَامَةَ وَ الْوَلَايَةَ وَ الْوَصِيَّةَ فَقَالَ قَدْ رَضِيتُ

ثُمَّ أَرْسَلَ إِلَى فَاطِمَةَ أَنَّ اللَّهَ يُبَشِّرُنِي بِمَوْلُودٍ يُولَدُ لَكِ تَقْتُلُهُ أُمَّتِي مِنْ بَعْدِي فَأَرْسَلَتْ إِلَيْهِ لَا حَاجَةَ لِي فِي مَوْلُودٍ مِنِّي تَقْتُلُهُ أُمَّتُكَ مِنْ بَعْدِكَ فَأَرْسَلَ إِلَيْهَا أَنَّ اللَّهَ قَدْ جَعَلَ فِي ذُرِّيَّتِهِ الْإِمَامَةَ وَ الْوَلَايَةَ وَ الْوَصِيَّةَ فَأَرْسَلَتْ إِلَيْهِ أَنِّي قَدْ رَضِيتُ فَ حَمَلَتْهُ أُمُّهُ كُرْهاً وَ وَضَعَتْهُ كُرْهاً وَ حَمْلُهُ وَ فِصالُهُ ثَلاثُونَ شَهْراً

حَتَّى إِذا بَلَغَ أَشُدَّهُ وَ بَلَغَ أَرْبَعِينَ سَنَةً قالَ رَبِّ أَوْزِعْنِي أَنْ أَشْكُرَ نِعْمَتَكَ الَّتِي أَنْعَمْتَ عَلَيَّ وَ عَلى والِدَيَّ وَ أَنْ أَعْمَلَ صالِحاً تَرْضاهُ وَ أَصْلِحْ لِي فِي ذُرِّيَّتِي فَلَوْ لَا أَنَّهُ قَالَ أَصْلِحْ لِي فِي ذُرِّيَّتِي لَكَانَتْ ذُرِّيَّتُهُ كُلُّهُمْ أَئِمَّةً

وَ لَمْ يَرْضَعِ الْحُسَيْنُ مِنْ فَاطِمَةَ ( عليها السلام ) وَ لَا مِنْ أُنْثَى كَانَ يُؤْتَى بِهِ النَّبِيَّ فَيَضَعُ إِبْهَامَهُ فِي فِيهِ فَيَمُصُّ مِنْهَا مَا يَكْفِيهَا الْيَوْمَيْنِ وَ الثَّلَاثَ فَنَبَتَ لَحْمُ الْحُسَيْنِ ( عليه السلام ) مِنْ لَحْمِ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ وَ دَمِهِ وَ لَمْ يُولَدْ لِسِتَّةِ أَشْهُرٍ إِلَّا عِيسَى ابْنُ مَرْيَمَ ( عليه السلام ) وَ الْحُسَيْنُ بْنُ عَلِيٍّ ( عليه السلام ) .

وَ فِي رِوَايَةٍ أُخْرَى عَنْ أَبِي الْحَسَنِ الرِّضَا ( عليه السلام ) أَنَّ النَّبِيَّ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) كَانَ يُؤْتَى بِهِ الْحُسَيْنُ فَيُلْقِمُهُ لِسَانَهُ فَيَمُصُّهُ فَيَجْتَزِئُ بِهِ وَ لَمْ يَرْتَضِعْ مِنْ أُنْثَى .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ali Bin Ismail, from Muhammad Bin Amro Al Zayyat, from a man from our comanions,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Jibraeel<sup>as</sup> descended unto Muhammad<sup>saww</sup> and said to him<sup>saww</sup>: ‘O Muhammad<sup>saww</sup>! Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Give you<sup>saww</sup> glad tidings that (Syeda) Fatima<sup>asws</sup> will be Blessed with the one<sup>asws</sup> who Your<sup>saww</sup> community will kill after you<sup>saww</sup>’. So he<sup>saww</sup> said: ‘O Jibraeel<sup>saww</sup>, and upon my<sup>saww</sup> Lord<sup>azwj</sup> be the greetings! Why there is a need for me<sup>saww</sup> regarding a son<sup>asws</sup> whom my<sup>saww</sup> community would be killing after me<sup>saww</sup>’.

So he<sup>as</sup> ascended, then descended, and said to him<sup>saww</sup> the likes of that. So he<sup>saww</sup> said: ‘O Jibraeel<sup>as</sup>! And upon my<sup>saww</sup> Lord<sup>azwj</sup> be the greetings! Why there is a need for me<sup>saww</sup> regarding a birth whom my<sup>saww</sup> community would be killing, from after me<sup>saww</sup>’.

So Jibraeel<sup>as</sup> ascended to the sky, then descended, so he<sup>as</sup> said: ‘O Muhammad<sup>saww</sup>! Your<sup>saww</sup> Lord<sup>azwj</sup> Conveys the greetings and Gives you<sup>saww</sup> that He<sup>azwj</sup> would be Making to be Imams<sup>asws</sup> in his<sup>asws</sup> offspring, and the Wilayah, and the successorship’. So he<sup>saww</sup> said: ‘I<sup>saww</sup> have been pleased’.

Then hesaww sent a message to (Syeda) Fatimaasws: ‘Allahazwj Gives youasws glad tidings that youasws will be Blessed (with a son). Mysaww community would be killing himasws after mesaww’. So sheasws sent a message to himsaww: ‘Why there is a need for measws having the oneasws who would be killed by yoursaww community after yousaww’. So hesaww sent a message to herasws: ‘Allahazwj has Made to be in hisasws offspring, the Imamate, and the Wilayah, and the succesorship’. So sheasws sent a message to himsaww: ‘Iasws have been pleased’. [46:15] with abhorrence did his mother bear him and with abhorrence did she bring him forth; and the bearing of him and the weaning of him was thirty months.

When he<sup>asws</sup> reached strength and reached forty years of age, he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Lord<sup>azwj</sup>! Advise me<sup>asws</sup> to thank for Your<sup>azwj</sup> Bounties which You<sup>azwj</sup> have Favoured upon me<sup>asws</sup> and upon my<sup>asws</sup> parents, and the righteous deeds You<sup>azwj</sup> would be Pleased with, and Correct for me<sup>asws</sup> among my<sup>asws</sup> offspring’. And had he<sup>asws</sup> not said ‘Correct for me<sup>asws</sup> among my<sup>asws</sup> offspring’, it would have been so that his<sup>asws</sup> offspring, all of them would have been Imams<sup>asws</sup>.

And Al-Husayn<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup> did not take milk from Fatima<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup>, nor from a (another) woman. He<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup> used to be brought to the Prophet<sup style="font-weight: normal">saww</sup>, so he<sup style="font-weight: normal">saww</sup> would place his<sup style="font-weight: normal">saww</sup> thumb in his<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup> mouth, so he<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup> would suckle from it what sufficed him<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup> for two days or three. Thus, the flesh of Al-Husayn<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup> was built from the flesh of Rasool-Allah<sup style="font-weight: normal">saww</sup> and his<sup style="font-weight: normal">saww</sup> blood. And there was not come in (in the world) a six months except for Isa<sup style="font-weight: normal">as</sup> Bin Maryam<sup style="font-weight: normal">as</sup> and Al-Husayn<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup> Bin Ali<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup>’.

And in another report from Abu Al-Hassan Al-Reza<sup>asws</sup>: ‘The Prophet<sup>saww</sup>, they used to come to him<sup>saww</sup> with Al Husayn<sup>asws</sup>, so he<sup>saww</sup> would morsel for him<sup>asws</sup> his<sup>saww</sup> own tongue, so he<sup>asws</sup> would suckle with it, and he<sup>asws</sup> did not breastfeed from a woman’.
en.sarwar: 2. A number of our people has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Ali ibn al-Hakam from ‘Abd al-Rahman al-‘Arzami from abu ‘Abdallah (a.s.) who has said the following. “The time between the birth of al-Hassan and the conception for al-Husayn was like one menstuaral cycle and the time between the birth of the two was six months and tendays.”
